hero.title: Leonardo Velasco
hero.subtitle: Data Analyst & Systems Engineer
hero.description: I transform data into strategic decisions combining systems engineering precision with advanced statistical analysis.

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.text1: I am a Systems and Information Technology Engineering student with a minor in Data Analysis with computer tools. I specialize in designing systems that not only work, but also generate, organize and analyze data to support decision making.
profile.text2: My approach combines software engineering, statistical analysis and data visualization to solve real business problems through reliable information.

education.title: Education
education.minor: Minor: Data analysis with computer tools

items.title: Interactive Sales Dashboard
items.description: Tableau dashboard with trend analysis, customer segmentation and future sales prediction. SQL Server integration for real-time updates.

items.title: Customer Churn Prediction
items.description: Machine Learning model to predict customer churn with 87% accuracy. Includes exploratory analysis, data cleaning and interactive visualizations.

items.title: ETL Pipeline with AWS
items.description: Automated pipeline for data extraction, transformation and loading from multiple sources. Implemented with AWS Lambda, S3 and Redshift.

items.title: Social Media Sentiment Analysis
items.description: NLP-based sentiment analysis system to classify customer opinions in real-time. Monitoring dashboard with key metrics.

items.title: Recommendation System
items.description: Collaborative filtering algorithm for product recommendation. Matrix factorization implementation and evaluation with RMSE and MAE metrics.

items.title: COVID-19 Data Visualization
items.description: Interactive web application with heat maps, time series and comparative analysis between countries. Automatic data updates.

footer.description: Data Analyst & Systems Engineer specialized in turning complex data into actionable insights.
